hero_desc: Simple, transparent pricing — no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your sport and budget. Monthly billing available.

included_items.title: Gym Access
included_items.text: Full access to our multi-level fitness center — cardio, free weights, and resistance machines.

included_items.title: Pool Access
included_items.text: Use of the heated 50-meter Olympic pool at any time during facility hours.

included_items.title: Group Classes
included_items.text: Unlimited group fitness classes — yoga, Pilates, HIIT, Barre, cycling, Fitdanz, and more.

included_items.title: Locker Rooms
included_items.text: Full locker room access with showers, steam rooms, saunas, and the co-ed jacuzzi.

plans_subtitle: All plans are billed monthly. Sign-up processed through Club Automation.
badminton_note: 🏸 Badminton Program — Relaunching July 2026. Contact us to get on the interest list and be notified when the program opens.
family_subtitle: Los Cab offers family membership options so every member of your household can enjoy all club amenities at a discounted rate.

family_features.title: Family Memberships Available
family_features.desc: Add spouse, partner, and children to your membership at reduced monthly rates.

family_features.title: Junior Programs Included
family_features.desc: Kids gain access to Junior Tennis Academy, Youth Pickleball, Swim School, and Water Polo programs.

family_features.title: Flexible Add-Ons
family_features.desc: Mix and match membership types for different family members based on their preferred sports.

faqs.question: How do I sign up?
faqs.answer: Memberships are processed through Club Automation, our online membership management system. You can also visit us in person at 17272 Newhope St., Fountain Valley or call (714) 546-8560.

faqs.question: Are there long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: All memberships are billed monthly. There are no long-term contract requirements. An initiation fee applies when you first join. Contact us for cancellation terms.

faqs.question: Can I try the club before joining?
faqs.answer: Yes! Contact us at (714) 546-8560 or visit the club to arrange a tour and trial visit. Our membership team will walk you through all the facilities and programs available.

faqs.question: Are group fitness classes included?
faqs.answer: Yes — all group fitness classes (yoga, Pilates, HIIT, Barre, cycling, Fitdanz, line dancing, and more) are included with every Sports, Pickleball, and Tennis membership at no extra charge.

faqs.question: Is personal training extra?
faqs.answer: Personal training sessions with our certified trainers are available for an additional fee beyond your monthly membership. Contact the fitness team at fitness@loscab.com to schedule a session.

faqs.question: Can children join?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer junior programs for tennis, pickleball, swimming (Nova Swim School), water polo, and more. Family add-on rates allow you to include dependents on your primary membership.

cta_text: Contact us today and our membership team will help you find the perfect plan.
